page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: This 3D proximity tool can be used to identify mutation hotspots from linear protein sequence and correlate the hotspots with known or potentially interacting domains, mutations, or drugs. Mutation-mutation and mutation-drug clusters can also be identified and viewed.
page_metadata.biotools__summary:
An integrated resource for mutation analysis in protein 3D structures.

Analyse Mutations in Protein 3D Structures.

Analysing Your Own Mutation Data for Clusters.

No need to screen for mutation types provided. Any variant classifications can for HotSpot3D, not just missense mutation.
